import json, re
base="/Users/osherelhadad/.claude/projects/-private-tmp-nm-capevolve-cap-evolve--capevolve-run-full-work-cand-0001/b20a6cda-451a-4cd2-9e01-11a19f9285bf/tool-results/"
files={"23":"bgqkea050.txt","27":"bx2ul3549.txt","30":"b7fia1y3e.txt","31":"bml4wxo99.txt","32":"buqhfmxix.txt","33":"buy33njsl.txt","34":"br3r2ez1a.txt"}
for tid,fn in files.items():
    raw=open(base+fn).read()
    m=re.search(r'\{"input"', raw)
    raw=raw[m.start():]
    d=json.loads(raw); ro=d["rollout"]; md=ro.get("metadata",{}); ri=md.get("tau2_reward_info"); sc=d.get("score",{})
    print("="*70)
    print("TASK",tid,"reward=",sc.get("reward"),"tau2_reward=",md.get("tau2_reward"))
    print("FEEDBACK:", (sc.get("feedback") or "")[:1100])
    if ri:
        print("KEYS:«redacted» list(ri.keys()))
        print("db_check:", json.dumps(ri.get("db_check"))[:1300])
        print("action_checks:", json.dumps(ri.get("action_checks"))[:2400])
        for k in ("reward_basis","nl_assertions","communicate_info","info","env_assertions"):
            if k in ri: print(k,":",json.dumps(ri[k])[:800])
